name: Peking Beef (Mongolian Beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beef, egg white, salt, and 1 tablespoon of cornstarch in a bowl. Mix well by hand.
2. Heat oil to 400°F (204°C) and deep fry the beef for 30 seconds. Drain on paper towels.
3. Reheat 2 cups of oil to 375°F (190°C) in a wok. Stir-fry bamboo shoots and green onions for 1 minute.
4. Combine the sauce ingredients in a bowl and add them to the vegetables. Bring to a boil.
5. Add the beef and stir fry quickly until heated through. Serve.
